name: vim.lsp.protocol
documentation: Protocol for the Microsoft Language Server Protocol (mslsp)

fields.name: CodeActionKind
documentation: A set of predefined code action kinds

fields.name: CodeActionTriggerKind
documentation: The reason why code actions were requested.

fields.name: CompletionItemKind
documentation: The kind of a completion entry.

fields.name: CompletionTag
documentation: Completion item tags are extra annotations that tweak the rendering of a

fields.name: InsertTextFormat
documentation: Defines whether the insert text in a completion item should be interpreted as

fields.name: MarkupKind
documentation: Describes the content type that a client supports in various
Please note that `MarkupKinds` must not start with a `$`. This kinds

fields.name: TextDocumentSaveReason
documentation: Represents reasons why a text document is saved.

fields.name: TextDocumentSyncKind
documentation: Defines how the host (editor) should sync document changes to the language server.

fields.name: _request_name_to_capability
documentation: Generated by gen_lsp.lua, keep at end of file.
Maps method names to the required server capability

fields.name: make_client_capabilities
documentation: Gets a new ClientCapabilities object describing the LSP client

fields.name: resolve_capabilities
documentation: Creates a normalized object describing LSP server capabilities.
@*param* `server_capabilities` — Table of capabilities supported by the server
